description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky yacht with a rectangular, open-topped hull rendered in a brown color. The hull features stepped, pixel-like edges and a flat bottom, giving it a simplified, geometric appearance. A single, tall mast rises from the center of the hull, supporting a large, triangular sail that is beige in color and also constructed in a stepped, pixelated style. The yacht sits on a flat, black base, which appears to serve as a display or support platform. There are no visible railings, cabins, or deck equipment, and the interior of the hull is open and unobstructed. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible markings, windows, or additional features.
description: A blocky, brown yacht with an open rectangular hull and a tall mast supporting a large, stepped beige sail, all set on a flat black base. The design is minimalistic and geometric, with no visible cabins or deck equipment.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the stepped triangular sail, open hull, and the mast rising from the center.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the rectangular bow and the central mast, with the open hull visible.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the open stern, the mast, and the sail from behind.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the stern's stepped design and the mast's attachment point.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a monohull with a rectangular, flat-bottomed shape and stepped, blocky sides. It is rendered in a uniform brown color with no visible keels, chines, or markings.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is open with no visible levels, cockpits, walkways, railings, or seating areas. The interior is unobstructed, and there is a single mast rising from the center.
attribute_cabin_structure: No cabin structure is visible; the hull is open-topped with no windows, doors, or superstructure.
